obs_lab_01.title: CHIMERA / OBS — session log
lines: The glass was never rated for stress at this psi.
Subject keeps mapping the seam with its shoulder.
If anyone reads this: the mute alarm is lying.
They renamed the wing again. I am tired.

utility_bot_01.title: Maint-bot 4 — shell
lines: If you are not maintenance, please put me back.
I was only trying to buff the floor.

janus_closet_01.title: Mug.log — corrupted
lines: The two-faced door only opens if you stop pretending
(You were never supposed to compile this.)
